parameters.query:
with budget as (
  select site_id, category, sum(budgeted_amount) as budgeted_amount
  from budget_line
  group by site_id, category
),
actuals as (
  select site_id, cost_type as category, amount as actual_amount
  from actual_cost
  union all
  select pr.site_id, 'labor' as category, pl.gross_amount as actual_amount
  from payroll_run pr
  join payroll_line pl on pl.payroll_run_id = pr.id
),
actuals_agg as (
  select site_id, category, sum(actual_amount) as actual_amount
  from actuals
  group by site_id, category
),
flagged as (
  select
    s.owner_id,
    s.site_name,
    b.category,
    b.budgeted_amount,
    coalesce(a.actual_amount,0) as actual_amount,
    round(coalesce(a.actual_amount,0) / nullif(b.budgeted_amount,0) * 100, 1) as pct_spent
  from budget b
  join sites s on s.id = b.site_id and s.status = 'active'
  left join actuals_agg a on a.site_id = b.site_id and a.category = b.category
  where b.budgeted_amount > 0
    and coalesce(a.actual_amount,0) / nullif(b.budgeted_amount,0) >= 0.9
)
select
  f.owner_id,
  p.phone_number as owner_phone,
  count(*) as flagged_count,
  string_agg(
    '- ' || f.site_name || ' (' || f.category || '): KES ' || to_char(f.actual_amount, 'FM999,999,999') || ' / KES ' || to_char(f.budgeted_amount, 'FM999,999,999') || ' (' || f.pct_spent || '%)',
    E'\n' order by f.pct_spent desc
  ) as digest_body
from flagged f
join profiles p on p.id = f.owner_id
group by f.owner_id, p.phone_number;

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "number": $json.owner_phone.replace(/\D/g, ''), "text": "⚠️ *Budget Overrun Alert*

" + $json.flagged_count + " budget line(s) at or above 90% spent:

" + $json.digest_body + "

Open Mutiso.AI to review." } }}
